  <!-- Performance API Polyfills -->
  <script>
  (function () {
    var noop = function noop() {};
    if ("performance" in window === false) {
      window.performance = {};
    }
    window.performance.mark = performance.mark || noop;
    window.performance.measure = performance.measure || noop;
    if ("now" in window.performance === false) {
      var nowOffset = Date.now();
      if (performance.timing && performance.timing.navigationStart) {
        nowOffset = performance.timing.navigationStart;
      }
      window.performance.now = function now() {
        return Date.now() - nowOffset;
      };
    }
  })();
  </script>

  <!-- Globals Definitions -->
  <script>
    (function () {
      var now = Date.now()
      window.initialTimestamps = {
        initialTimestamp: now,
        initialRequestTimestamp: Math.round(performance.timeOrigin ? performance.timeOrigin : now - performance.now())
      }

      window.thunderboltTag = "libs-releases-GA-local"
      window.thunderboltVersion = "1.16889.0"
    })();
  </script>

<body class='' >
<script type="text/javascript">
    var bodyCacheable = true;
    
    var exclusionReason = {"shouldRender":true,"forced":false};
    var ssrInfo = {"cacheExclusionReason":"","renderBodyTime":854,"renderTimeStamp":1771665895457}
</script>







    <!--pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart start-->
    <script type="wix/htmlEmbeds" id="pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart start"></script>
    
    <script type="wix/htmlEmbeds" id="pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart end"></script>
    <!--pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart end-->




<script id="wix-first-paint">
    if (window.ResizeObserver &&
        (!window.PerformanceObserver || !PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes.indexOf('paint') === -1)) {
        new ResizeObserver(function (entries, observer) {
            entries.some(function (entry) {
                var contentRect = entry.contentRect;
                if (contentRect.width > 0 && contentRect.height > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(function (now) {
                        window.wixFirstPaint = now;
                        dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wixFirstPaint'));
                    });
                    observer.disconnect();
                    return true;
                }
            });
        }).observe(document.body);
    }
</script>


<script id="scroll-bar-width-calculation">
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.style.overflowY = 'scroll'
    div.style.width = '50px'
    div.style.height = '50px'
    div.style.visibility = 'hidden'
    document.body.appendChild(div)
    const scrollbarWidth= div.offsetWidth - div.clientWidth
    document.body.removeChild(div)
    if(scrollbarWidth > 0){
        document.body.style.setProperty('--scrollbar-width', `${scrollbarWidth}px`)
    }
</script>

    <svg data-dom-store style="display:none"><defs id="dom-store-defs"></defs></svg>

time.<br class="wixui-rich-text__text">
It&#39;s the first place consumers turn for trusted information and product recommendations and&nbsp;</span></span><span style="font-size:22px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:wfont_7854d3_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034483a6d1,wf_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034,orig_roobert_light;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">accounts for nearly 10% of total TV viewing, setting the record for the highest share ever achieved by a streaming platform.</span></span></h2></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lvlfp1eu1" class="comp-lvlfp1eu1 wixui-repeater"><div class="o6oDlF" id="comp-lvaz2hyi3" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lvaz2hyi3 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:18px; line-height:1.8em;"><span style="font-family:wfont_7854d3_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034483a6d1,wf_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034,orig_roobert_light;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:18px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Tired of black-box pricing and underwhelming performance on YouTube? Nomology is your solution. We&#39;re a full-service YouTube advertising partner that empowers brands to achieve superior results. Our team of YouTube veterans leverages cutting-edge proprietary technology to craft data-driven strategies, ensuring your campaigns reach the right audience at the right time. With transparent pricing models, you&#39;ll gain complete control over your budget and optimize for maximum impact. </span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:18px; line-height:1.8em;">&nbsp;</p>

<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:18px; line-height:1.8em;"><span style="font-family:wfont_7854d3_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034483a6d1,wf_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034,orig_roobert_light;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:18px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">We go beyond basic YouTube advertising. Nomology offers full-service support, inclusion lists, CTV for holistic video buying, and partnership programs to support you and integrate seamlessly into your workflow. Ready to take your YouTube advertising to the next level? Partner with Nomology and see what&#39;s possible.</span></span></span></p></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lvb1o46x" class="comp-lvb1o46x" data-semantic-classname="button"><a data-testid="linkElement" href="https://www.nomology.com/solutions" target="_self" class="StylableButton2545352419__root style-lvb1olbq__root wixui-button StylableButton2545352419__link" aria-label="Our Solutions"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Our Solutions</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="13.05 2.55 33.878 54.8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 60 60">
    <g>
        <path d="M46.5 28.9L20.6 3c-.6-.6-1.6-.6-2.2 0l-4.8 4.8c-.6.6-.6 1.6 0 2.2l19.8 20-19.9 19.9c-.6.6-.6 1.6 0 2.2l4.8 4.8c.6.6 1.6.6 2.2 0l21-21 4.8-4.8c.8-.6.8-1.6.2-2.2z"/>

</span></span></span></a></div><!--/$--></div></div></div><!--/$--></div></section><!--/$--></div></div></section><!--/$--><!--$--><section id="comp-lvazf56k" tabindex="-1" class="Oqnisf comp-lvazf56k wixui-section" data-block-level-container="ClassicSection"><div id="bgLayers_comp-lvazf56k" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER comp-lvazf56k" class="MW5IWV"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="LWbAav Kv1aVt"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-lvazf56k" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-lvazf56k" class="VgO9Yg"><wow-image id="img_comp-lvazf56k" class="jhxvbR Kv1aVt dLPlxY mNGsUM bgImage" data-image-info="{&quot;containerId&quot;:&quot;comp-lvazf56k&quot;,&quot;alignType&quot;:&quot;center&quot;,&quot;displayMode&quot;:&quot;fill&quot;,&quot;targetWidth&quot;:980,&quot;targetHeight&quot;:731,&quot;isLQIP&quot;:true,&quot;encoding&quot;:&quot;AVIF&quot;,&quot;imageData&quot;:{&quot;width&quot;:3300,&quot;height&quot;:1856,&quot;uri&quot;:&quot;0e99ed_a0ebc40c7a0f4f19b6b820875a7827d2~mv2.png&quot;,&quot;name&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;displayMode&quot;:&quot;fill&quot;,&quot;hasAnimation&quot;:false}}" data-motion-part="BG_IMG comp-lvazf56k" data-bg-effect-name="" data-has-ssr-src="true"><img src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/0e99ed_a0ebc40c7a0f4f19b6b820875a7827d2~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_49,h_28,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/0e99ed_a0ebc40c7a0f4f19b6b820875a7827d2~mv2.png" alt="homepage-bg2.png" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:50% 50%" width="980" height="731"/></wow-image></div></div><div data-mesh-id="comp-lvazf56kinlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="comp-lvazf56kinlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><!--$--><div id="comp-lvazf56z" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lvazf56z wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h2 class="font_0 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:56px; line-height:1em;"><span style="font-family:wfont_7854d3_23b1812e72c0412eb27645005a46fb40,wf_23b1812e72c0412eb27645005,orig_roobert_regular;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:56px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Don&#39;t Get Stuck in the Dark:<br class="wixui-rich-text__text">
Dynamic Rates vs. Black Box Pricing</span></span></h2></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lvazf572" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lvazf572 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:1.8em;"><span style="font-family:wfont_7854d3_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034483a6d1,wf_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034,orig_roobert_light;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Traditional YouTube pricing can feel like navigating blindfolded. You might see some results, but it&#39;s hard to know what&#39;s working and where your budget is going. Black box models prioritize selling ad space, not your campaign&#39;s success. This lack of transparency often leads to wasted funds and ineffective campaigns. </span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:1.8em;">&nbsp;</p>

<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:1.8em;"><span style="font-family:wfont_7854d3_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034483a6d1,wf_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034,orig_roobert_light;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Nomology offers a different approach with transparent dynamic rates. High-performing ads win better placements based on Google&#39;s algorithm, lowering your cost per view and maximizing your return on investment. We provide clear visibility into your budget, allowing you to see exactly how it drives results. </span></span></span></p></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lvb1vfgv" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lvb1vfgv wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:22px; line-height:1.3em;"><span style="font-size:22px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:wfont_7854d3_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034483a6d1,wf_e5e3ebb2c1fc466f96a403034,orig_roobert_light;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Focus on what matters most: growing your brand on YouTube. Let Nomology handle the complexities of pricing and optimization. We ensure your budget prioritizes high-performing ads for breakthrough YouTube advertising success.</span></span></span></p></div><!--/$--></div></div></section><!--/$--><!--$--><section id="comp-lvb0srrz" tabindex="-1" class="Oqnisf comp-lvb0srrz wixui-section" data-block-level-container="ClassicSection"><div id="bgLayers_comp-lvb0srrz" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER comp-lvb0srrz" class="MW5IWV"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="LWbAav Kv1aVt"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-lvb0srrz" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-lvb0srrz" class="VgO9Yg"></div></div><div data-mesh-id="comp-lvb0srrzinlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="comp-lvb0srrzinlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><!--$--><div id="comp-lvb0srs91" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lvb0srs91 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h2 class="font_0 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:56px; line-height:normal; text-align:center;"><span class=" wixui-rich-text__text" style="color:rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="font-family:wfont_7854d3_23b1812e72c0412eb27645005a46fb40,wf_23b1812e72c0412eb27645005,orig_roobert_regular;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:56px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Our Approach to YouTube<br class="wixui-rich-text__text">

class="wixui-rich-text__text">Partnerships</span></span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-kmjc05hw" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-kmjc05hw wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_6 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:21px; line-height:1.4em;"><span style="font-size:21px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Our Trusted Partnerships Program incentivizes and rewards media agencies and their clients on the YouTube platform. By aligning rewards with specific campaign goals and exceeding performance targets, this program fosters a more collaborative and transparent relationship between agencies and clients, ultimately driving better results and value creation for YouTube ad campaigns.</span></span></span></p></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div class="comp-lvb2iqzx FubTgk" id="comp-lvb2iqzx" aria-disabled="false"><a data-testid="linkElement" href="https://www.nomology.com/partnerships" target="_self" class="uDW_Qe wixui-button PlZyDq" aria-disabled="false" aria-label="Learn More"><span class="l7_2fn wixui-button__label">Learn More</span></a></div><!--/$--></div></div></div><!--/$--></div></section><!--/$--><!--$--><section id="comp-lvb2e6w8" class="comp-lvb2e6w8 CohWsy wixui-column-strip"><div id="bgLayers_comp-lvb2e6w8" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER comp-lvb2e6w8" class="if7Vw2"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="tcElKx i1tH8h"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-lvb2e6w8" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-lvb2e6w8" class="wG8dni"></div></div><div data-testid="columns" class="V5AUxf"><!--$--><div id="comp-lvb2e6yn" class="comp-lvb2e6yn YzqVVZ wixui-column-strip__column"><div id="bgLayers_comp-lvb2e6yn" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER comp-lvb2e6yn" class="MW5IWV"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="LWbAav Kv1aVt"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-lvb2e6yn" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-lvb2e6yn" class="VgO9Yg"></div></div><div data-mesh-id="comp-lvb2e6yninlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="comp-lvb2e6yninlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><!--$--><div id="comp-lvb2evop" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lvb2evop wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:22px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">&ldquo;Not only has Nomology generated greater cost efficiencies across all our client verticals with their technology, but they provide exceptional client service. Even with challenging categories, their team has driven positive results and are always willing to go the extra mile to ensure our needs are met.&rdquo;</span></span></span></p></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-kn2v5qpm" class="MazNVa comp-kn2v5qpm wixui-image"><div data-testid="linkElement" class="j7pOnl"><img loading="lazy" sizes="70px" srcSet="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/0e99ed_f79dbec7aabe4ce9ba56cf89e403d34e~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_70,h_70,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/chalita.jpeg 1x, https://static.wixstatic.com/media/0e99ed_f79dbec7aabe4ce9ba56cf89e403d34e~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_140,h_140,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/chalita.jpeg 2x" id="img_comp-kn2v5qpm" src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/0e99ed_f79dbec7aabe4ce9ba56cf89e403d34e~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_70,h_70,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/chalita.jpeg" alt="Nomology Client Testimonial 1" style="object-fit:cover" class="BI8PVQ Tj01hh" width="70" height="70"/></div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-kn2tbyby3" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-kn2tbyby3 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_9 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:1.4em; font-size:14px;"><span style="letter-spacing:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Chalita Dasnajali</span></p>

<p class="font_9 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:1.4em; font-size:14px;"><span style="letter-spacing:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">VP Media, 	window.resolveExternalsRegistryPromise = null

    window.resolveExternalsRegistryModule = (name) => externalRegistryPromise.then(() => window.externalsRegistry[name].onload())

        <script>
			const wixAdsOffsetHeight = document.getElementById('WIX_ADS')?.offsetHeight || 0;
			const header = document.getElementsByTagName('header')[0];

			let headerOffsetHeight = 0;

			if (header) {
				const headerPosition = window.getComputedStyle(header).getPropertyValue('position').toLowerCase();
				const isHeaderStickyOrFixed = headerPosition === 'sticky' || headerPosition === 'fixed';
				headerOffsetHeight = isHeaderStickyOrFixed ? header.offsetHeight : 0;
			}

			document.documentElement.style.scrollPaddingTop = `${wixAdsOffsetHeight + headerOffsetHeight}px`;
        </script>
